title: CommonDefinitions
description: Shared type definitions referenced by all ShruggieTech knowledge base schemas. This file is the single source of truth for Uuid, IsoDate, TagLabel, AliasLabel, NameIdReference, and ExternalReference.

title: ShruggieTech Credentials Manifest
description: Metadata-only catalog of credentials required by a ShruggieTech project. This schema deliberately prohibits storage of credential values; values live exclusively in their target systems and are referenced by this manifest, never embedded in it.

title: DirectoryIndex
description: Machine-generated table of contents for a directory. Produced by the pre-build script. Never hand-authored. Committed alongside content.

title: ObjectEnvelope
description: Base schema for every standalone JSON object in the knowledge base. Concrete schemas (Person, Organization) extend this via allOf composition. The envelope is never instantiated directly.

title: Organization
description: Profile of an organization relevant to ShruggieTech.

title: Person
description: Profile of a person relevant to ShruggieTech. Stable identity and role data only; per-interaction prep notes belong in the future CRM, not here.

title: DocumentFrontmatter
description: A JSON Schema for validating the frontmatter format used by ShruggieTech knowledge base Markdown documents.

title: Reference Mapping
description: A JSON Schema for validating ShruggieTech reference mapping entries, which track old-to-new value migrations across documentation scopes with support for exact, regex, and contextual match modes.

title: shruggie-indexer schema
description: A JSON Schema for validating shruggie-indexer outputs. This is the current schema used for shruggie-indexer and the related metadexer project.

title: shruggie-indexer schema
description: A JSON Schema for validating shruggie-indexer outputs. It is now deprecated by the v4 schema.

title: shruggie-indexer schema
description: A JSON Schema for validating shruggie-indexer outputs. It is now deprecated by the v4 schema.

title: shruggie-indexer schema
description: A JSON Schema for validating shruggie-indexer outputs. This is the original schema used for the initial shruggie-indexer (Powershell 'MakeIndex' utility). It is now deprecated by the v4 schema.

title: shruggie-fetcher schema
description: A JSON Schema for validating shruggie-fetcher target definitions and runtime request conditions.

title: Web Manifest
description: A JSON Schema for validating web manifest files.

title: SMS Backup & Restore
description: A JSON Schema derived from the XML outputs generated by the SMS Backup & Restore mobile application.
notes: This schema is UNOFFICIAL. It is not in any way affiliated with or sponsored by the original mobile application developer SyncTech.
